title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif (Cursor co-founder) interviews Simon Eskildsen (turbopuffer CEO) on infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the recurring emergence of new database companies, and the challenges of AI coding agents. Topics include flash sales, on-call engineering principles, database evolution, and hiring P99 engineers in the AI era.
